title: acer trifidum f. buergerianum
intro: Acer trifidum f. buergerianum, also known as the Japanese maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acer trifidum f. buergerianum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water.
